summary.zh: 通过描边偏移逐步绘制图标、路径或解释性连线。
summary.en: Draw icons, paths, or explanatory connectors with stroke offset animation.

definition.zh: SVG 路径像被一支隐形画笔描摹一样自行绘制出来。
definition.en: Animating SVG stroke dash values reveals a path progressively along its length.

description.zh: 演示使用较长时长以便观察完整变化；生产界面的即时反馈应收敛到 300ms 内。
description.en: Uses a longer demo duration so the full change stays observable; immediate production UI feedback should stay under 300ms.

description.zh: 控制动效开始前的等待时间。
description.en: Controls the wait before motion begins.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 沿 SVG 路径逐步绘制图标、流程线或解释性连接，强调结构形成过程。
purpose.en: Draw an SVG path progressively to emphasize how an icon, flow, or explanatory connection forms.

frequency.zh: 适合低频品牌时刻和解释动画；高频图标直接显示完整形态。
frequency.en: Reserve for low-frequency brand moments and explanations, showing frequent icons immediately.

trigger.zh: 由内容首次呈现或用户主动重播触发，路径顺序遵循视觉阅读方向。
trigger.en: Trigger on first presentation or explicit replay, ordering paths by visual reading direction.

enterExit.zh: 进入从完整 dash offset 绘制到零；离开通常淡出完整线条。
enterExit.en: Draw from full dash offset to zero on enter and usually fade the complete line on exit.

interruptibility.zh: 重播前先清晰重置，过程中被中断则保留当前可见路径。
interruptibility.en: Reset clearly before replay and preserve the currently visible path if interrupted.

gestureRules.zh: 无需手势；重播按钮支持键盘，并为图形提供文本含义。
gestureRules.en: No gesture is required; replay supports keyboard input and the graphic has a textual meaning.

reducedMotion.zh: 直接显示完整路径，或使用一次极短淡入。
reducedMotion.en: Show the complete path immediately or with one very short fade.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查 pathLength 与 dasharray 在不同 SVG 下正确归一化。
reviewNotes.en: Normalize pathLength and dasharray across SVG assets.

reviewNotes.zh: 保持线条绘制顺序与信息逻辑一致。
reviewNotes.en: Align drawing order with the information logic.
